[Page 1]
Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
September 30, 2025
• Seasonal Headwinds as We Enter October - Despite relatively robust spot rates
Short-term Indicators
across all dry bulk segments, a note of caution for the near term is warranted. Momentum: Negative
Historically, October has not been favorable for dry bulk spot rates, with the Baltic
Dry Index, a broad measure of spot global dry bulk rates, declining in 9 of the last Sentiment: Neutral
10 Octobers. We believe this pattern stems from the historically strong September Fundamentals: Neutral
rates, which often give way to softer rates in the following month.
